feat.name: Multifaceted Will
feat.text: Without the firm hand of a patron, your power begins to reflect deeper complexities, sometimes latching onto entirely unexpected sources of magical potency. When you cast or Sustain manifest will, you can choose any tradition’s manifestation. While the spell is active, you and allies in its area gain a +1 status bonus to saves against spells with that tradition trait.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
